                x'e baДҹlДұ deДҹil       x'e baДҹlДұ kДұsДұm

Argmax:
  xМӮ_ML = argmax_x log p(y|x)
         = argmax_x [-||y-Ax||вӮӮВІ]
         = argmin_x  ||y-Ax||вӮӮВІ
         = xМӮ_LS

Yani: GГјrГјltГјyГј Gaussian ve i.i.d. varsayarsanДұz, ML tahmini otomatik olarak
En KГјГ§Гјk Kareler (LS) Г§Г¶zГјmГј veriyor. LS'nin stokastik temeli bu.

sections.heading: FarklДұ gГјrГјltГјler farklДұ tahmin ediciler verir
sections.text:
GГјrГјltГј her zaman Gaussian deДҹil. Г–lГ§Гјm cihazДұna gГ¶re deДҹiЕҹir:

GГјrГјltГј daДҹДұlДұmДұ вҶ’ log p(y|x) вҶ’ ML minimizasyon terimi:

  i.i.d. Gaussian:
    n ~ N(0,ПғВІ)  вҶ’  -log p вҲқ ||y-Ax||вӮӮВІ  вҶ’  xМӮ_ML = xМӮ_LS

  Korelasyonlu Gaussian (R_n biliniyor):
    -log p вҲқ (y-Ax)бөҖ R_nвҒ»В№ (y-Ax) = ||y-Ax||ВІ_{R_nвҒ»В№}
    вҶ’ AДҹДұrlДұklДұ LS, W = R_nвҒ»В№

  Poisson (foton sayДұmДұ, kamera, nГјkleer gГ¶rГјntГјleme):
    n ~ Poisson вҶ’ xМӮ_ML iГ§inde KL-divergence minimizasyonu var
    DoДҹrusal deДҹil, iteratif Г§Г¶zГјm gerekiyor

  Laplace/Double-Exponential (generalized, p=1):
    -log p вҲқ ||y-Ax||вӮҒ  вҶ’ L1 norm minimizasyonu
    Seyrek Г§Г¶zГјm Гјretiyor (bazДұ bileЕҹenler tam sДұfДұr)

SeГ§iminiz: Fiziksel gГјrГјltГј modeline uyan likelihood'u kullanДұn,
ML size doДҹru cost fonksiyonunu veriyor.

vs03.title: Bayesian Tahmin вҖ” MMSE ve MAP
vs03.summary: x rassal, prior p_x(x) biliniyor. MMSE = posterior mean E[x|y] вҖ” optimal ama hesabДұ Г§ok zor. MAP = posterior modu вҖ” optimizasyona indirgeniyor.
vs03.context: EE499 В· Chapter 3 В· Section 3.3.2 вҖ” Bayesian Estimation

sections.heading: Bayesian yaklaЕҹДұm ne oluyor?
sections.text:
ML'de x deterministik, sadece gГјrГјltГјden gelen rastgelelik vardДұ.
Bayesian'da ise x de rassal вҖ” ve hakkДұnda bir bilginiz var.

OrneДҹin: Bir hastanДұn kan Еҹekerini tahmin ediyorsunuz.
  Prior bilgi: p_x(x) вҖ” kan Еҹekeri normal insanlar iГ§in yaklaЕҹДұk Gaussian, ortalama 5.5 mmol/L
  GГ¶zlem: y вҖ” kalibrasyonlu bir Г¶lГ§Гјm cihazДұnДұn gГјrГјltГјlГј okumasДұ
  Hedef: xМӮ = p(x|y) posterior daДҹДұlДұmДұnДұ kullanarak tahmin et

Bayes kuralДұ:
  p(x|y) = p(y|x) В· p(x) / p(y)
            в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ   в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ   в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
           likelihood  prior  evidence (sabit, normalizer)

p(x|y) 'posterior daДҹДұlДұm' вҖ” gГ¶zlem y'yi gГ¶rdГјkten sonra x hakkДұnda
gГјncellenmiЕҹ bilgi. Bayes'in Г¶zГј: prior'u likelihood ile gГјncelleyerek posterior elde et.

sections.heading: MMSE = posterior mean вҖ” neden?
sections.text:
MMSE maliyet fonksiyonu: cost(xМӮ, x) = (x - xМӮ)ВІ

  xМӮ_MMSE = argmin_{xМӮ} E[(x - xМӮ)ВІ]

Bu beklenti x Гјzerinde, posterior p(x|y)'e gГ¶re alДұnДұr.
TГјrev sДұfДұrlanДұnca:
  вҲӮ/вҲӮxМӮ E[(x - xМӮ)ВІ] = -2 E[x-xМӮ] = 0
  вҶ’ xМӮ_MMSE = E[x|y] = вҲ« x В· p(x|y) dx

Yani MMSE tahmini, posterior daДҹДұlДұmДұnДұn ortalamasДұdДұr.

Bu Г§ok zarif bir sonuГ§: 'ortalama kare hata minimum?' diye sordunuz, cevap 'posterior ortalamasДұnДұ al' Г§ДұktДұ.

Sorun nerede?
  - p(x|y) hesaplamak Г§oДҹunlukla Г§ok zor вҖ” Bayes kuralДұndaki payda вҲ«p(y|x)p(x)dx entegrali
    genellikle analitik olarak Г§Г¶zГјlemiyor
  - KapalДұ form yok вҶ’ Monte Carlo (Г¶rnekleme) gerekiyor вҶ’ yavaЕҹ

вҳ… Г–nemli not:
  EДҹer xМӮ = f(y) fonksiyonuna lineerlik kДұsДұtДұ eklerseniz вҶ’ LMMSE.
  LMMSE sadece E[x], E[y], E[xy] istiyor. ГҮok daha kolay.
  Gaussian istatistiklerde MMSE = LMMSE (!) вҖ” Г§ГјnkГј posterior Gaussian olunca
  ortalamasДұ da linear bir fonksiyon oluyor.

sections.heading: MAP = posterior modu вҖ” deterministik Г§erГ§eveye kГ¶prГј
sections.text:
FarklДұ bir maliyet fonksiyonu kullanalДұm: 0-1 loss
  cost = 0 eДҹer |xМӮ-x| < Оө, 1 eДҹer daha bГјyГјk

Bu maliyeti minimize etmek вҶ’ en olasДұ x'i bulmak вҶ’ posterior'un modu:
  xМӮ_MAP = argmax_x p(x|y)

Bayes kuralДұ ile:
  log p(x|y) = log p(y|x) + log p(x) - log p(y)
                                         в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ x'e baДҹlДұ deДҹil, ignore

  xМӮ_MAP = argmax_x [log p(y|x) + log p(x)]
          = argmin_x [-log p(y|x) - log p(x)]
          в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
          data fidelity     regularization
          (gГјrГјltГј daДҹДұlДұmДұna baДҹlДұ)   (prior'a baДҹlДұ)

Bu son form Г§ok Г¶nemli: MAP = data fidelity + regularization minimizasyonu!
Yani Chapter 2'de keyfi seГ§tiДҹiniz regularization terimi,
aslДұnda bir prior daДҹДұlДұmДұna karЕҹДұlДұk geliyor.

XМӮ_MAP = argmin_x О”(y, Ax) + О»R(x)

vs03.title: MAP ile FarklДұ Prior ve GГјrГјltГј: Tikhonov'dan LASSO'ya
vs03.summary: Prior ve gГјrГјltГј daДҹДұlДұmДұna gГ¶re MAP farklДұ optimizasyon problemlerine indirgeniyor. Gaussian prior = Tikhonov, Laplace prior = L1 regularization = sparse recovery.
vs03.context: EE499 В· Chapter 3 В· Section 3.3.2 вҖ” MAP Variants & Connection to LMMSE

sections.heading: Prior seГ§imi regularization Еҹeklini belirliyor
sections.text:
xМӮ_MAP = argmin_x [-log p(y|x) - log p(x)] = argmin_x О”(y,Ax) + О»R(x)

Prior ne seГ§erseniz R(x) o oluyor:

Gaussian prior: p_x(xвұј) вҲқ exp(-xвұјВІ/2Пғ_xВІ)
  вҶ’ -log p(x) вҲқ ОЈxвұјВІ = ||x||вӮӮВІ
  вҶ’ R(x) = ||x||вӮӮВІ вҖ” L2 regularization (Tikhonov/Ridge)
  вҶ’ KГјГ§Гјk ama sДұfДұr olmayan Г§Г¶zГјmler tercih edilir
  вҶ’ KapalДұ form Г§Г¶zГјm var: xМӮ = (AбҙҙA + О»I)вҒ»В№Aбҙҙy

Laplace prior: p_x(xвұј) вҲқ exp(-c|xвұј|)
  вҶ’ -log p(x) вҲқ ОЈ|xвұј| = ||x||вӮҒ
  вҶ’ R(x) = ||x||вӮҒ вҖ” L1 regularization (LASSO)
  вҶ’ Seyrek Г§Г¶zГјmler Гјretir: bazДұ bileЕҹenler tam sДұfДұr
  вҶ’ Compressed sensing'in temeli
  вҶ’ KapalДұ form yok, convex ama non-smooth вҶ’ iteratif Г§Г¶zГјm

Generalized Gaussian: p_x вҲқ exp(-c|xвұј|^p)
  вҶ’ R(x) = ||x||_p^p  вҶ’ L_p regularization
  p=1: Laplace, p=2: Gaussian, 0<p<1: daha seyrek

sections.heading: GГјrГјltГј seГ§imi data fidelity Еҹeklini belirliyor
sections.text:
AynДұ Еҹekilde gГјrГјltГј daДҹДұlДұmДұ О”(y, Ax) terimini belirliyor:

i.i.d. Gaussian: n ~ N(0,ПғВІ)
  вҶ’ -log p(y|x) вҲқ ||y-Ax||вӮӮВІ вҶ’ L2 data fidelity

Korelasyonlu Gaussian: n ~ N(0, R_n)
  вҶ’ -log p(y|x) вҲқ (y-Ax)бөҖ R_nвҒ»В№ (y-Ax) вҶ’ Mahalanobis norm

Poisson: foton sayДұm gГјrГјltГјsГј (CT, PET)
  вҶ’ -log p(y|x) вҲқ KL-divergence
  вҶ’ Iteratif algoritma gerekiyor (EM algoritmasДұ)

Generalized Gaussian (pвү 2):
  вҶ’ ||y-Ax||_p^p вҶ’ L_p data fidelity

GenelleЕҹtirilmiЕҹ MAP formu:
  xМӮ_MAP = argmin_x О”(y, Ax) + О»R(x)

GГјrГјltГј daДҹДұlДұmДұ вҶ’ О” seГ§imi
Prior daДҹДұlДұmДұ вҶ’ R seГ§imi
О» = gГјrГјltГј/prior gГјГ§ oranДұ

sections.heading: Gaussian istatistiklerde MAP = LMMSE вҖ” bu bГјyГјk!
sections.text:
x ~ N(0, R_x) ve n ~ N(0, R_n) alДұrsak:

LMMSE formГјlГј:
  xМӮ_LMMSE = R_x AбөҖ (AR_x AбөҖ + R_n)вҒ»В№ y
            = (AбөҖ R_nвҒ»В№ A + R_xвҒ»В№)вҒ»В№ AбөҖ R_nвҒ»В№ y

MAP formГјlГј (bu istatistiklerle):
  -log p(y|x) вҲқ 1/(2Пғ_nВІ) ||y-Ax||вӮӮВІ  (Gaussian noise)
  -log p(x)   вҲқ xбөҖ R_xвҒ»В№ x / 2        (Gaussian prior)
  xМӮ_MAP = argmin_x [||y-Ax||ВІ_{R_nвҒ»В№} + xбөҖ R_xвҒ»В№ x]
  вҶ’ xМӮ_MAP = (AбөҖ R_nвҒ»В№ A + R_xвҒ»В№)вҒ»В№ AбөҖ R_nвҒ»В№ y

AynДұ formГјl! Gaussian'da MAP = MMSE = LMMSE.

Bu neden?
  Gaussian posterior da Gaussian вҶ’ modu = ortalamasДұ вҶ’ MAP = MMSE
  LMMSE Gaussian'da optimal вҶ’ MMSE = LMMSE
  Zincir: MAP = MMSE = LMMSE

Praktik sonuГ§: R_x ve R_n'i veriden tahmin edin.
Bunu yapДұnca hem optimal Bayesian tahmini hem de en iyi deterministik
regularization'Дұ aynДұ anda elde ediyorsunuz. AДҹДұrlДұk ve regularization seГ§imi
artДұk keyfi deДҹil вҖ” veriden geliyor.

vs03.title: BГјyГјk Г–lГ§ekli Ters Problemlerde Optimizasyon
vs03.summary: Her tahmin yГ¶ntemi О”(y,Ax)+О»R(x) minimizasyonuna indirgeniyor. KapalДұ form yoksa sayДұsal yГ¶ntemler gerekiyor. Convex ise global minimum garantili.
vs03.context: EE499 В· Chapter 3 В· Section 3.4 вҖ” Optimization for Inverse Problems

sections.heading: Neden optimizasyon gerekiyor?
sections.text:
Hem ML hem MAP hem de LMMSE sonuГ§ta Еҹu forma indirgeniyor:
  xМӮ = argmin_x О”(y, Ax) + О»R(x)

Bazen bu problemin kapalДұ form Г§Г¶zГјmГј var вҖ” matris denklemi Г§Г¶z, bitir.
Г–rneДҹin LS: xМӮ = (AбҙҙA)вҒ»В№Aбҙҙy, Tikhonov: xМӮ = (AбҙҙA+О»I)вҒ»В№Aбҙҙy.

Ama Г§oДҹunlukla durum Еҹu:
  - A Г§ok bГјyГјk (Г¶rneДҹin 10MГ—10M boyutlu tomografi matrisi)
    вҶ’ (AбҙҙA)вҒ»В№ almak mГјmkГјn deДҹil, belleДҹe sДұДҹmДұyor bile
  - О” veya R(x) pГјrГјzsГјz deДҹil (L1 normu, Poisson, ...)
    вҶ’ TГјrev her yerde tanДұmlДұ deДҹil вҶ’ kapalДұ form yok
  - A kГ¶tГј koЕҹullanmДұЕҹ (ill-conditioned)
    вҶ’ SayДұsal ters alma kararsДұz

ГҮГ¶zГјm: Д°terasyonel (tekrarlayan) sayДұsal yГ¶ntemler.
Her adДұmda biraz ilerle, minimize et, yakДұns.

sections.heading: Convex ve non-convex вҖ” kritik ayrДұm
sections.text:
Optimizasyon problemine dalmadan Г¶nce sorulmasДұ gereken soru:
J(x) maliyet fonksiyonu convex mi?

Matematiksel tanДұm:
  J(axвӮҒ + (1-a)xвӮӮ) вүӨ aJ(xвӮҒ) + (1-a)J(xвӮӮ)  вҲҖaвҲҲ[0,1]
  Geometrik: iki nokta arasДұndaki doДҹru parГ§asДұ, fonksiyonun altДұnda.

CONVEX J(x) ise:
  - Her lokal minimum aynДұ zamanda global minimum
  - Herhangi bir yerel optimizasyon yГ¶ntemi Г§Г¶zГјme yakДұnsar
  - Sonuca ulaЕҹДұlacaДҹДұ garantidir
  - LS, Tikhonov, LASSO (L1 reg.) hepsi convex

NON-CONVEX J(x) ise:
  - Birden fazla local minimum var, hangisindesiniz bilinmez
  - BaЕҹlangДұГ§ noktasДұ kritik вҖ” farklДұ baЕҹlangДұГ§ = farklДұ sonuГ§
  - Global optimum garantisi yok
  - Deep learning kayДұp fonksiyonlarДұ genellikle non-convex
    (ama pratikte iyi Г§alДұЕҹДұyor вҖ” neden? Hala aktif araЕҹtДұrma konusu)

Bu yГјzden convex problem olduДҹunu fark etmek Г§ok deДҹerli:
'Bu problem convex' derseniz, tГјm yerel yГ¶ntemler iЕҹe yarar demek.

vs03.title: Gradient Д°niЕҹ, Newton ve Conjugate Gradient
vs03.summary: ГңГ§ ana iteratif optimizasyon yГ¶ntemi: steepest descent (gradient tersine git, yavaЕҹ), Newton (Hessian kullan, hДұzlДұ ama pahalДұ), conjugate gradient (ikisi arasДұnda pratik seГ§im).
vs03.context: EE499 В· Chapter 3 В· Section 3.4.3-3.4.4 вҖ” Optimization Methods

sections.heading: Steepest Descent вҖ” sezgiden denkleme
sections.text:
Sezgi: Bir daДҹДұ inerken her adДұmda en dik yГ¶nГј seГ§ersiniz.

J(x) maliyet fonksiyonunun gradient vektГ¶rГј вҲҮJ(x) nerede en hДұzlДұ artДұyor?
Tam gradient yГ¶nГјnde. O zaman en hДұzlДұ azalma gradient'in tam tersi yГ¶nГјnde:
  d = -вҲҮJ(x)

GГјncelleme kuralДұ:
  x^(n+1) = x^(n) - П„^(n) В· вҲҮJ(x^(n)) / ||вҲҮJ(x^(n))||вӮӮ

П„ adДұm bГјyГјklГјДҹГј (learning rate) вҖ” ne kadar ilerliyoruz?
  ГҮok bГјyГјk: sallanДұr, yakДұnsamaz
  ГҮok kГјГ§Гјk: Г§ok yavaЕҹ yakДұnsar
  Optimal: line search ile her adДұmda hesapla (pahalДұ ama kararlДұ)

YakДұnsama hДұzДұ: lineer вҖ” her adДұmda sabit bir oran kadar hata azalДұyor.
Bir oran r < 1 varsa: hata ~ r^n вҶ’ logaritmik adДұm sayДұsДұ.

Sorun: 'dar vadiler'de (elongated elliptic contours) Г§ok yavaЕҹ.
Gradient, vadinin boyunca deДҹil, geniЕҹliДҹine doДҹru iЕҹaret ediyor вҶ’ zigzag.

sections.heading: Newton YГ¶ntemi вҖ” neden bu kadar hДұzlДұ?
sections.text:
Steepest descent, J'yi her noktada dГјz bir yГјzey (hyperplane) ile yaklaЕҹДұktДұ.
Newton, J'yi ikinci derece yГјzey (paraboloid) ile yaklaЕҹДұktДұ:

  J(x + П„d) вүҲ J(x) + П„ dбөҖвҲҮJ(x) + П„ВІ/2 dбөҖ вҲҮВІJ(x) d
                       в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ   в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
                       1. derece      2. derece (Hessian)

Bu ikinci derece yaklaЕҹДұmДұ minimize et:
  вҲӮ/вҲӮd [birinci + ikinci terim] = 0
  вҲҮJ(x) + П„ вҲҮВІJ(x) d = 0
  d = -(вҲҮВІJ(x))вҒ»В№ вҲҮJ(x)   (П„=1 ile)

GГјncelleme:
  x^(n+1) = x^(n) - (вҲҮВІJ(x^(n)))вҒ»В№ вҲҮJ(x^(n))

YakДұnsama hДұzДұ: kuadratik вҖ” her adДұmda hata kabaca karesi kadar kГјГ§ГјlГјyor.
Yani 10вҒ»Ві hata varsa bir adДұmda 10вҒ»вҒ¶ olabiliyor.

Sorun: вҲҮВІJ(x) = Hessian matrisi, NГ—N boyutlu.
  - Hesaplama: O(NВІ) eleman, her iterasyonda
  - Ters alma: O(NВі) iЕҹlem
  - N bГјyГјk olunca (milyonlarca parametre) imkansДұz

Quasi-Newton (BFGS):
  -(вҲҮВІJ)вҒ»В№ yerine yaklaЕҹДұm B kullan, iteratif gГјncelle.
  Newton'dan ucuz, Steepest descent'ten hДұzlДұ.

sections.heading: Conjugate Gradient вҖ” neden bu kadar popГјler?
sections.text:
Conjugate gradient (CG), steepest descent'e bir 'momentum' ekliyor.
ГҮok farklДұ bir teorik temeli var: 'conjugate direction methods'.

Fikir: Her adДұmda, sadece gradient deДҹil, Г¶nceki yГ¶nleri de kullan.
Bu yГ¶nler 'A-conjugate' olacak Еҹekilde seГ§iliyor: dбөўбөҖ A dвұј = 0 (iвү j)

GГјncelleme:
  d^(0) = -вҲҮJ(x^(0))    (ilk adДұm steepest descent gibi)
  x^(n+1) = x^(n) + П„^(n) d^(n)
  d^(n+1) = -вҲҮJ(x^(n+1)) + B^(n) d^(n)   (momentum terimi!)

B^(n) iki popГјler seГ§enek:
  Fletcher-Reeves:  B = -||вҲҮJ(x^(n+1))||вӮӮВІ / ||вҲҮJ(x^(n))||вӮӮВІ
  Polak-RibiГЁre:    Biraz farklДұ вҖ” pratikte genellikle daha iyi

Neden bu kadar iyi?
  - Quadratic J iГ§in: N adДұmda kesin Г§Г¶zГјme ulaЕҹДұr (N = boyut)
  - Non-quadratic iГ§in: approximation ama yine Г§ok hДұzlДұ
  - O(N) bellek: sadece gradient vektГ¶rГј saklanДұyor
  - Newton hДұzДұna yakДұn, Newton maliyeti yok

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Praktik karЕҹДұlaЕҹtДұrma:
  Steepest descent: en basit, en yavaЕҹ, NВІ+ adДұm gerekebilir
  Newton:           en hДұzlДұ, ama O(NВі) her adДұmda вҶ’ bГјyГјk N'de imkansДұz
  Conjugate gradient: ikisi arasДұnda, O(N) bellek, pratikte en yaygДұn
  BFGS/L-BFGS:     quasi-Newton, bГјyГјk problemler iГ§in standart
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

py01.title: print()
py01.summary: Stdout'a yazar. sep argГјmanlar arasДұ, end son argГјman sonrasДұ.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: print(*args, sep=' ', end='\n', file=sys.stdout, flush=False)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Stdout'a yazar. sep argГјmanlar arasДұ, end son argГјman sonrasДұ.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
print('Hello', 'World')        # Hello World
print(1, 2, 3, sep=', ')       # 1, 2, 3
print('no newline', end=' ')   # satДұr sonu yok
print(f'x={x:.2f}')            # f-string ile

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: flush=True real-time output iГ§in (progress bar gibi). file=sys.stderr ile stderr'e yazar.

py01.title: input()
py01.summary: stdin'den satДұr okur. Her zaman string dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: val = input('prompt: ')

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: stdin'den satДұr okur. Her zaman string dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
name = input('Name: ')             # str
age  = int(input('Age: '))         # int'e Г§evir
x, y = map(int, input().split())   # iki int al

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Her zaman str dГ¶ner, explicit Г§evrim gerek. map(int, input().split()) yaygДұn pattern.

py01.title: type() / isinstance()
py01.summary: type(): tam tipi verir. isinstance(): inheritance'Дұ da kontrol eder, tercih edilen yol.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: type(x)  |  isinstance(x, type_or_tuple)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: type(): tam tipi verir. isinstance(): inheritance'Дұ da kontrol eder, tercih edilen yol.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
type(42)                      # <class 'int'>
type('hi') == str             # True
isinstance(42, int)           # True
isinstance(3.14, (int,float)) # True (tuple ile OR)
isinstance(True, int)         # True! (bool int'ten tГјrer)

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: isinstance() kullan, type() == deДҹil. bool int subclass'ДұdДұr.

py01.title: range()
py01.summary: Lazy integer dizisi Гјretir. List'e Г§evirmeden iterasyon iГ§in ideal.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: range(stop)  |  range(start, stop, step)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Lazy integer dizisi Гјretir. List'e Г§evirmeden iterasyon iГ§in ideal.

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: O(1) space. `x in range(n)` O(1)'dir, list'te O(n). Geriye sayДұm iГ§in step=-1.

py01.title: enumerate()
py01.summary: (index, value) Г§iftleri dГ¶ner. range(len(lst)) kullanmaya gerek kalmaz.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: enumerate(iterable, start=0)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: (index, value) Г§iftleri dГ¶ner. range(len(lst)) kullanmaya gerek kalmaz.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: range(len(lst)) yerine hep enumerate kullan. start parametresi 1-indexed sayДұm iГ§in.

py01.title: Unpacking / *rest
py01.summary: Extended unpacking ile fazla elemanlarДұ yakala. Tek satДұrda swap.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
a, b, *rest = iterable
x, y = y, x

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Extended unpacking ile fazla elemanlarДұ yakala. Tek satДұrda swap.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
a, b, c = [1, 2, 3]
first, *rest = [1,2,3,4]    # first=1, rest=[2,3,4]
*init, last  = [1,2,3,4]    # init=[1,2,3], last=4
a, *_, z = range(10)        # a=0, z=9 (orta atlanДұr)
x, y = y, x                 # swap (temp yok)

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: * assignment'ta her zaman list yaratДұr, boЕҹ bile: a, *b = [1] вҶ’ b=[].

py01.title: Walrus Operator :=
py01.summary: Assignment expression. Assign ederken aynДұ zamanda deДҹeri dГ¶ner. Python 3.8+

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: name := expr

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Assignment expression. Assign ederken aynДұ zamanda deДҹeri dГ¶ner. Python 3.8+

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# while loop:
while chunk := f.read(1024):
    process(chunk)

# if:
if m := re.search(pattern, text):
    print(m.group())

# comprehension:
results = [y for x in data if (y := f(x)) > 0]

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Normal atama ile karДұЕҹtДұrma: := sadece expression context'te. Г–zellikle while/if'te kullanДұЕҹlДұ.

py01.title: OperatГ¶rler & Tip DГ¶nГјЕҹГјmГј
py01.summary: Python'da Г¶zel operatГ¶rler ve tip dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmleri. `==` deДҹer eЕҹitliДҹi, `is` nesne kimliДҹi.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: //  %  **  ==  is  int()  float()  str()

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Python'da Г¶zel operatГ¶rler ve tip dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmleri. `==` deДҹer eЕҹitliДҹi, `is` nesne kimliДҹi.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
10 // 3          # 3   (floor division)
10 % 3           # 1   (modulo)
2 ** 8           # 256 (kuvvet)
2 == 2.0         # True  (deДҹer eЕҹit)
2 is 2.0         # False (farklДұ nesne)
x = 3.7
int(x)           # 3   (kesmek)
float('3.14')    # 3.14
str(42)          # '42'
a = b = c = 0    # Г§oklu atama
x, y, z = 1,2,3  # tuple unpacking ile

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: `is` None kontrolГј iГ§in kullan: `if x is None`. SayДұlar iГ§in `==` kullan. `is` small int'lerde True gГ¶rГјnebilir (CPython cache) ama gГјvenme.

py01.title: Tuple
py01.summary: Immutable, sДұralДұ koleksiyon. List gibi ama deДҹiЕҹtirilemez. Heterogeneous (farklДұ tipler) olabilir.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: t = (a, b, c)  |  t = a, b, c  |  t = (x,)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Immutable, sДұralДұ koleksiyon. List gibi ama deДҹiЕҹtirilemez. Heterogeneous (farklДұ tipler) olabilir.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
t = (1, 'hello', 3.14)  # heterojen
t[0]                    # 1  (indexing
t[-1]                   # 3.14
x, y, z = t             # unpacking
a, b = b, a             # swap (tuple ile)

# Tek elemanlДұ tuple вҖ” virgГјl Еҹart!
tek = (3,)              # tuple
tek = (3)               # int! (parantez)

# Tuple vs List:
tuple([1,2,3])          # list вҶ’ tuple
list((1,2,3))           # tuple вҶ’ list

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Tuple'lar dict key olabilir (hashable), list olamaz. VirgГјlsГјz `(x)` sadece parantez, tuple deДҹil.

py01.title: Modules & Import
py01.summary: ModГјl ve paket import yollarДұ. Her modГјl bir kez yГјklenir. `__name__` ile script/modГјl ayrДұmДұ yapДұlДұr.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
import x  |  import x as y
from x import y  |  from x.y import z

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: ModГјl ve paket import yollarДұ. Her modГјl bir kez yГјklenir. `__name__` ile script/modГјl ayrДұmДұ yapДұlДұr.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
import numpy                      # numpy.array()
import numpy as np                # np.array() вҖ” standart alias
from numpy import array, zeros    # direkt isimle
from numpy import array as arr    # alias ile

# Paket iГ§inden:
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from collections import defaultdict, Counter

# __name__ pattern вҖ” script vs modГјl:
def main():
    print('ГҮalДұЕҹДұyor')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()   # sadece `python dosya.py` ile Г§alДұЕҹДұrken
             # import edilince Г§alДұЕҹmaz

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: `from x import *` kullanma вҖ” namespace kirlenir. ModГјl deДҹiЕҹince Jupyter'da kernel restart gerekir (bir kez yГјklenir).

py01.title: pass / break / continue
py01.summary: Kontrol akДұЕҹДұ anahtar kelimeleri. pass: boЕҹ blok. break: dГ¶ngГјden Г§Дұk. continue: sonraki iterasyona atla.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: pass  |  break  |  continue

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Kontrol akДұЕҹДұ anahtar kelimeleri. pass: boЕҹ blok. break: dГ¶ngГјden Г§Дұk. continue: sonraki iterasyona atla.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: `for...else` ve `while...else` вҖ” break ile Г§ДұkДұlmadДұysa else Г§alДұЕҹДұr. Nadir ama kullanДұЕҹlДұ.

py01.title: if / elif / else
py01.summary: KoЕҹullu dallanma. Chained karЕҹДұlaЕҹtДұrma, short-circuit, truthy/falsy ve Python 3.10+ match-case destekler.

sections.heading: Syntax
AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: KoЕҹullu dallanma. Chained karЕҹДұlaЕҹtДұrma, short-circuit, truthy/falsy ve Python 3.10+ match-case destekler.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
x = 42
if x > 100:   print('bГјyГјk')
elif x > 10:  print('orta')
else:         print('kГјГ§Гјk')

# Chained вҖ” matematiksel notation
if 0 <= x < 100:          # 0 вүӨ x < 100
    print('aralДұkta')

# Ternary
result = 'pos' if x > 0 else 'neg'
grade  = 'A' if s>=90 else 'B' if s>=80 else 'C'

# Short-circuit: and/or
if name and name.startswith('A'):  # name boЕҹsa 2. part Г§alДұЕҹmaz
    print('A ile baЕҹlДұyor')
default = user_input or 'anonim'   # falsy ise saДҹ taraf

# Truthy / Falsy
if lst:        # [] вҶ’ False, doluysa True
if d:          # {} вҶ’ False
if x is None:  # None kontrolГј вҖ” == None deДҹil!
if not errors: # boЕҹsa True

# match-case (Python 3.10+) вҖ” structural pattern matching
point = (1, 0)
match point:
    case (0, 0):        print('Origin')
    case (x, 0):        print(f'x ekseninde x={x}')
    case (0, y):        print(f'y ekseninde y={y}')
    case (x, y):        print(f'({x}, {y})')
    case _:             print('diДҹer')

match command:
    case 'quit' | 'exit': sys.exit()
    case str(s) if s.startswith('go'): move(s)
    case _: print('bilinmeyen komut')

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Falsy: None, 0, 0.0, '', [], {}, set(), (). Short-circuit: `a and b` вҶ’ a False ise b hiГ§ eval edilmez, `a or b` вҶ’ a True ise b atlanДұr. match-case if-elif zincirinden daha performanslДұ ve okunabilir.

py01.title: for DГ¶ngГјsГј
py01.summary: Herhangi bir iterable Гјzerinde dГ¶ner. enumerate, zip, nested, reversed, sorted ve forвҖҰelse ile Г§ok yГ¶nlГј.

sections.heading: Syntax
AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Herhangi bir iterable Гјzerinde dГ¶ner. enumerate, zip, nested, reversed, sorted ve forвҖҰelse ile Г§ok yГ¶nlГј.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# Temel
for i in range(5):            # 0,1,2,3,4
for c in 'hello':             # karakter iter
for k, v in d.items():        # dict key-value

# Д°ndeks + deДҹer
for i, v in enumerate(lst):   # range(len(lst)) deДҹil!
for i, v in enumerate(lst, start=1):  # 1-indexed

# Paralel iterasyon
for a, b in zip(l1, l2):      # en kДұsa olanda durur
for a, b, c in zip(l1, l2, l3):

# SДұralДұ / ters
for x in sorted(lst, key=len):     # sДұralДұ
for x in reversed(lst):            # ters (in-place deДҹil)
for k in sorted(d, reverse=True):  # dict key sДұralДұ

# Nested loops
for i in range(3):
    for j in range(3):
        print(i, j)           # 9 satДұr

# forвҖҰelse вҖ” break olmadДұysa else Г§alДұЕҹДұr
for x in lst:
    if x == target:
        print('bulundu')
        break
else:
    print('bulunamadДұ')       # break yoksa

# Dikkat: loop sДұrasДұnda listeyi deДҹiЕҹtirme!
for x in lst[:]:              # kopya Гјzerinde dГ¶n
    if bad(x): lst.remove(x)

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: range(len(lst)) yerine hep enumerate kullan. Zip eЕҹit uzunluk bekler; farklДұ uzunluklar iГ§in itertools.zip_longest. reversed() iterator dГ¶ner вҖ” list(reversed(lst)) ile kopyala.

py01.title: while DГ¶ngГјsГј
py01.summary: KoЕҹul True olduДҹu sГјrece dГ¶ner. Sonsuz dГ¶ngГј veya koЕҹul Г¶nceden bilinmeyenler iГ§in kullanДұlДұr.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
while condition:
    ...

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: KoЕҹul True olduДҹu sГјrece dГ¶ner. Sonsuz dГ¶ngГј veya koЕҹul Г¶nceden bilinmeyenler iГ§in kullanДұlДұr.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: Sonsuz dГ¶ngГјden Г§Дұkmak iГ§in break veya koЕҹul deДҹiЕҹikliДҹi Еҹart. SayaГ§lДұ iterasyon iГ§in for + range tercih et.

py01.title: list.append() / extend()
py01.summary: append: tek eleman ekler. extend: iterable'daki tГјm elemanlarДұ ekler.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: lst.append(x)  |  lst.extend(iterable)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: append: tek eleman ekler. extend: iterable'daki tГјm elemanlarДұ ekler.

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: append([x]) listeyi iГ§ iГ§e ekler. extend([x]) dГјzleЕҹtirir. += in-place deДҹiЕҹtirir (id aynДұ kalДұr).

py01.title: list.insert() / remove() / pop()
py01.summary: insert: indekse ekle. remove: ilk eЕҹleЕҹeni sil. pop: indeksteki elemanДұ Г§Дұkar ve dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: lst.insert(i, x)  |  lst.remove(x)  |  lst.pop(i=-1)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: insert: indekse ekle. remove: ilk eЕҹleЕҹeni sil. pop: indeksteki elemanДұ Г§Дұkar ve dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: pop() sondan вҶ’ O(1). pop(i) ortadan вҶ’ O(n). remove() bulamazsa ValueError.

py01.title: list.sort() / sorted()
py01.summary: sort(): in-place, None dГ¶ner. sorted(): yeni list dГ¶ner. Д°kisi de Timsort kullanДұr.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
lst.sort(key=None, reverse=False)
sorted(iterable, key=None, reverse=False)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: sort(): in-place, None dГ¶ner. sorted(): yeni list dГ¶ner. Д°kisi de Timsort kullanДұr.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
nums = [3,1,4,1,5]
nums.sort()                       # [1,1,3,4,5]
nums.sort(reverse=True)           # [5,4,3,1,1]
words = ['banana','apple']
sorted(words, key=len)            # ['apple','banana']
pairs = [(1,'b'),(2,'a')]
sorted(pairs, key=lambda x: x[1]) # sДұralama 2. eleman

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: key=str.lower, key=len, key=lambda x: x[1] yaygДұn pattern'lar. operator.itemgetter(1) lambda'dan hДұzlДұ.

py01.title: List Slicing
py01.summary: Alt liste Г§ДұkarДұr. Negatif indeks sondan sayar. Yeni list dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: lst[start:stop:step]

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Alt liste Г§ДұkarДұr. Negatif indeks sondan sayar. Yeni list dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: a[::-1] reverse kopyasДұ. a[:] shallow copy. Slice assignment: a[1:3] = [9,8].

py01.title: List Comprehension
py01.summary: Compact list oluЕҹturma. for-loop + append'den hДұzlДұ. Ternary, nested, walrus, generator destekler.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
[expr for item in iter if cond]
[expr_if_true if cond else expr_if_false for ...]

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Compact list oluЕҹturma. for-loop + append'den hДұzlДұ. Ternary, nested, walrus, generator destekler.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# Temel
squares = [x**2 for x in range(10)]
evens   = [x for x in range(20) if x%2==0]

# Ternary (her elemana uygula, filtre deДҹil)
abs_v = [x if x >= 0 else -x for x in nums]
grade = ['pass' if x>=50 else 'fail' for x in scores]

# ГҮoklu koЕҹul (AND mantДұДҹДұ)
result = [x for x in range(50) if x%2==0 if x%3==0]

# Flatten (iГ§ iГ§e liste dГјzleЕҹtir)
flat = [x for row in matrix for x in row]

# String temizleme
clean = [w.strip().lower() for w in lines if w.strip()]

# Walrus := (hesaplamayДұ tekrarlamamak iГ§in)
results = [y for x in data if (y := f(x)) is not None]

# Matris transpose
transpose = [[row[i] for row in matrix]
             for i in range(len(matrix[0]))]

# () вҶ’ generator expression (lazy, bГјyГјk veri iГ§in)
gen = (x**2 for x in range(10**6))   # O(1) bellek
sum(x**2 for x in range(1000))        # direkt kullan
any(x > 5 for x in lst)               # short-circuit

# {} вҶ’ set / dict comprehension
uniq = {len(w) for w in words}
sq_d = {x: x**2 for x in range(5)}

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: 3'ten fazla for/if koyma вҖ” okunabilirlik bozulur, normal loop tercih et. Ternary ifade `if-else` her elemana uygulanДұr; sondaki `if` ise filtreler. Generator'u sum/any/all/max'e direkt ver, list() Г§evirme.

py01.title: zip()
py01.summary: Birden fazla iterable'Дұ Г§iftler. En kДұsa olanda durur.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: zip(*iterables)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Birden fazla iterable'Дұ Г§iftler. En kДұsa olanda durur.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
names  = ['Alice','Bob','Carol']
scores = [90, 85, 92]
for name, score in zip(names, scores):
    print(f'{name}: {score}')
d = dict(zip(names, scores))
a,b = zip(*[(1,'a'),(2,'b')])  # unzip

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: En kДұsa iterable'da durur. EЕҹit uzunluk iГ§in itertools.zip_longest() kullan.

py01.title: Set / Dict Comprehension
py01.summary: List comprehension'Дұn set ve dict versiyonlarДұ. {} parantez kullanДұr.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: {expr for x in iter}  |  {k: v for x in iter}

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: List comprehension'Дұn set ve dict versiyonlarДұ. {} parantez kullanДұr.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: BoЕҹ {} dict oluЕҹturur, boЕҹ set iГ§in `set()` kullan. Okunabilirlik iГ§in Г§ok iГ§ iГ§e yapmaktan kaГ§Дұn.

py01.title: str.split() / join()
py01.summary: split: string вҶ’ list. join: list вҶ’ string. En Г§ok kullanДұlan string iЕҹlemleri.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
s.split(sep=None, maxsplit=-1)
sep.join(iterable)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: split: string вҶ’ list. join: list вҶ’ string. En Г§ok kullanДұlan string iЕҹlemleri.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
'a,b,c'.split(',')      # ['a','b','c']
'hello world'.split()   # ['hello','world'] (whitespace)
','.join(['a','b','c']) # 'a,b,c'
' '.join(words)          # 'kelime1 kelime2'
''.join(chars)           # karakterleri birleЕҹtir

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: join() loop'ta += den Г§ok daha hДұzlДұ. sep.join(lst) Еҹeklinde, lst.join() deДҹil.

py01.title: str.strip() / replace()
py01.summary: strip: baЕҹ/son karakterleri siler (default: whitespace). replace: substring deДҹiЕҹtir.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: s.strip([chars])  |  s.replace(old, new, count=-1)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: strip: baЕҹ/son karakterleri siler (default: whitespace). replace: substring deДҹiЕҹtir.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
'  hello  '.strip()         # 'hello'
'xxhelloxx'.strip('x')     # 'hello'
'hello'.lstrip('h')        # 'ello'
'aabbcc'.replace('b','X')  # 'aaXXcc'
'aaa'.replace('a','b', 2)  # 'bba' (max 2)

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: String'ler immutable вҖ” tГјm metodlar yeni string dГ¶ner. strip('xy') her iki karakteri de siler.

py01.title: str.find() / count() / in
py01.summary: find: ilk eЕҹleЕҹmenin indeksi (-1 if not found). count: Г¶rtГјЕҹmeyen sayДұsДұ. in: Гјyelik testi.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: s.find(sub)  |  s.count(sub)  |  sub in s

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: find: ilk eЕҹleЕҹmenin indeksi (-1 if not found). count: Г¶rtГјЕҹmeyen sayДұsДұ. in: Гјyelik testi.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
'hello world'.find('world')  # 6
'hello'.find('xyz')          # -1  (ValueError yok)
'hello'.index('l')           # 2   (bulamazsa ValueError)
'abcabc'.count('abc')        # 2
'world' in 'hello world'     # True

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Sadece var/yok iГ§in 'in' kullan. index() bulamazsa ValueError, find() -1 dГ¶ner.

py01.title: f-strings
py01.summary: Python 3.6+ inline string interpolation. Format spec'ler ve dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmler desteklenir.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: f'{expr!r:.2f}'

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Python 3.6+ inline string interpolation. Format spec'ler ve dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmler desteklenir.

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: !r=repr, !s=str, !a=ascii. Format spec: {val:width.precisiontype}. Python 3.12'de {expr=} debug iГ§in.

py01.title: str.startswith() / endswith() / upper() / lower()
py01.summary: Prefix/suffix kontrolГј ve case dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmleri.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
s.startswith(prefix)  |  s.endswith(suffix)
s.upper()  |  s.lower()  |  s.title()  |  s.capitalize()

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Prefix/suffix kontrolГј ve case dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmleri.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
'hello'.startswith('he')    # True
'hello'.endswith(('lo','ly'))  # True (tuple!)
'hello'.upper()              # 'HELLO'
'HELLO'.lower()              # 'hello'
'hello world'.title()        # 'Hello World'
'hello'.capitalize()         # 'Hello'

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: startswith/endswith tuple alДұr: s.startswith(('http','https')).

py01.title: dict.get() / setdefault()
py01.summary: get: gГјvenli eriЕҹim, fallback ile. setdefault: yoksa ekle ve deДҹeri dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
d.get(key, default=None)
d.setdefault(key, default=None)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: get: gГјvenli eriЕҹim, fallback ile. setdefault: yoksa ekle ve deДҹeri dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: get() KeyError Г¶nler. setdefault() gruplama iГ§in ideal (defaultdict daha iyi Г§oДҹunlukla).

py01.title: dict.keys() / values() / items()
py01.summary: Dict'i iterate etmek iГ§in view objeleri. Dict deДҹiЕҹince dinamik gГјncellenir.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: d.keys()  |  d.values()  |  d.items()

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Dict'i iterate etmek iГ§in view objeleri. Dict deДҹiЕҹince dinamik gГјncellenir.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
d = {'a':1, 'b':2, 'c':3}
for k in d:           # key iter
for k in d.keys():    # aynДұ
for v in d.values():  # deДҹerler
for k,v in d.items(): # Г§iftler
'a' in d              # O(1) key check
list(d.values())      # [1,2,3]

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: View'lar dict'e baДҹlДұ. Loop sДұrasДұnda dict deДҹiЕҹtirme: list(d.items()) ile kopyala.

py01.title: Dict Comprehension / Merge
py01.summary: Compact dict oluЕҹturma ve birleЕҹtirme.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
{k: v for k, v in iter if cond}
d1 | d2  (Python 3.9+)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Compact dict oluЕҹturma ve birleЕҹtirme.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: Merge'de aynДұ key varsa saДҹ taraf kazanДұr. {**d1, **d2} dict() + update'den hДұzlДұ.

py01.title: collections.Counter
py01.summary: Dict subclass, sayma iГ§in. +/-/most_common() destekler. Eksik key 0 dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
from collections import Counter
Counter(iterable)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Dict subclass, sayma iГ§in. +/-/most_common() destekler. Eksik key 0 dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
from collections import Counter
c = Counter('abracadabra')
# Counter({'a':5,'b':2,'r':2,...})
c.most_common(3)    # [('a',5),('b',2),('r',2)]
c['z']              # 0  (KeyError yok!)
c1 + c2             # toplam
c1 - c2             # fark (sadece pozitifler)
Counter([1,1,2,3])[1]  # 2

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Anagram kontrolГј: Counter(s1)==Counter(s2). c.total() Python 3.10+.

py01.title: collections.defaultdict
py01.summary: Eksik key'de factory() Г§aДҹДұrarak default oluЕҹturur. KeyError yok.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
from collections import defaultdict
defaultdict(factory)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Eksik key'de factory() Г§aДҹДұrarak default oluЕҹturur. KeyError yok.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
from collections import defaultdict
graph = defaultdict(list)
graph['a'].append('b')  # KeyError yok

count = defaultdict(int)
for w in words:
    count[w] += 1

groups = defaultdict(set)
for k, v in pairs:
    groups[k].add(v)

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Factory: list, int, set, str, lambda: 0. Graph adjacency list iГ§in Г§ok yaygДұn.

py01.title: Set Д°Еҹlemleri
py01.summary: SДұrasДұz unique elemanlar. O(1) ortalama lookup/insert/delete.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
s.add(x)  |  s.remove(x)  |  s.discard(x)
s1 | s2  &  -  ^

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: SДұrasДұz unique elemanlar. O(1) ortalama lookup/insert/delete.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
s = {1, 2, 3}
s.add(4)         # {1,2,3,4}
s.remove(1)      # KeyError if missing
s.discard(99)    # hata yok
s1 | s2          # birleЕҹim
s1 & s2          # kesiЕҹim
s1 - s2          # fark
s1 ^ s2          # simetrik fark
s1 <= s2         # subset mi?
set([1,1,2,3])   # {1,2,3} unique

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: discard() kullan, emin deДҹilsen. set(lst) ile list'ten dup'larДұ sil. frozenset hashable.

py01.title: lambda / map() / filter()
py01.summary: lambda: isimsiz fonksiyon. map/filter lazy iterator dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
lambda args: expr
map(func, iter)  |  filter(func, iter)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: lambda: isimsiz fonksiyon. map/filter lazy iterator dГ¶ner.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
sq = lambda x: x**2
sq(5)   # 25

list(map(lambda x: x**2, [1,2,3]))      # [1,4,9]
list(filter(lambda x: x>2, [1,2,3,4])) # [3,4]

# List comp Г§oДҹunlukla daha okunabilir:
[x**2 for x in [1,2,3]]
[x for x in [1,2,3,4] if x>2]

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: map(str, nums) gibi builtin'lerle kullanДұlabilir. Filter yerine list comp daha pythonic.

py01.title: *args / **kwargs
py01.summary: *args: pozisyonel argГјmanlarДұ tuple olarak toplar. **kwargs: keyword argГјmanlarДұ dict olarak.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: def f(*args, **kwargs)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: *args: pozisyonel argГјmanlarДұ tuple olarak toplar. **kwargs: keyword argГјmanlarДұ dict olarak.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: * tek baЕҹДұna keyword-only zorunlu kДұlar. f(**d) ile dict'i unpack edebilirsin.

py01.title: any() / all()
py01.summary: any: en az biri truthy ise True. all: hepsi truthy ise True. Short-circuit.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: any(iterable)  |  all(iterable)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: any: en az biri truthy ise True. all: hepsi truthy ise True. Short-circuit.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
any([0, 0, 1])              # True
any([0, 0, 0])              # False
all([1, 2, 3])              # True
all([1, 0, 3])              # False
any(x > 5 for x in nums)   # generator ile
all(c.isdigit() for c in s) # tГјm harfler rakam?

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Generator geГ§ir, liste deДҹil: any(x>0 for x in million_list) bГјyГјk list'lerde Г§ok daha hДұzlДұ.

py01.title: Mutable Default Arg TuzaДҹДұ
py01.summary: Mutable default argГјmanlar fonksiyon tanДұmДұnda bir kez oluЕҹturulur вҖ” her Г§aДҹrДұda paylaЕҹДұlДұr!

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
def f(x, L=None):  # вң“
def f(x, L=[]):    # вң— tuzak

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Mutable default argГјmanlar fonksiyon tanДұmДұnda bir kez oluЕҹturulur вҖ” her Г§aДҹrДұda paylaЕҹДұlДұr!

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# YANLIЕһ вҖ” L tГјm Г§aДҹrДұlar arasДұnda paylaЕҹДұlДұr
def append_to(x, L=[]):
    L.append(x)
    return L
append_to(1)   # [1]
append_to(2)   # [1, 2]  вҶҗ beklenmiyordu!

# DOДһRU вҖ” None sentinel kullan
def append_to(x, L=None):
    if L is None:
        L = []
    L.append(x)
    return L
append_to(1)   # [1]
append_to(2)   # [2]  вң“

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: None sentinel pattern: list, dict, set default argГјmanlarДұ iГ§in her zaman. AynДұ tuzak sДұnДұf deДҹiЕҹkenleri iГ§in de geГ§erli.

py01.title: Scope: global / nonlocal
py01.summary: Python LEGB kuralДұ: Local вҶ’ Enclosing вҶ’ Global вҶ’ Built-in. global/nonlocal ile dДұЕҹ deДҹiЕҹken deДҹiЕҹtir.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: global x  |  nonlocal x

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Python LEGB kuralДұ: Local вҶ’ Enclosing вҶ’ Global вҶ’ Built-in. global/nonlocal ile dДұЕҹ deДҹiЕҹken deДҹiЕҹtir.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
x = 10
def func():
    global x        # dДұЕҹ x'i deДҹiЕҹtir
    x = 99
func(); print(x)    # 99

# nonlocal вҖ” iГ§ iГ§e fonksiyonlar iГ§in
def outer():
    count = 0
    def inner():
        nonlocal count   # enclosing scope
        count += 1
    inner(); inner()
    return count         # 2

# Okuma iГ§in global gerekmez:
y = 5
def read(): return y + 1  # OK, sadece oku

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: global kullanmaktan kaГ§Дұn вҖ” yan etki yaratДұr. Bunun yerine argГјman/return kullan. nonlocal closure pattern'Дұnda kullanДұlДұr.

py01.title: Decorators
py01.summary: Fonksiyonu sarmalayan (wrap) baЕҹka bir fonksiyon. DavranДұЕҹ eklemenin temiz yolu.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
@decorator
def func(): ...

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Fonksiyonu sarmalayan (wrap) baЕҹka bir fonksiyon. DavranДұЕҹ eklemenin temiz yolu.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: functools.wraps(func) kullan вҖ” wrapper'Дұn __name__/__doc__ Г¶zelliklerini korur. YaygДұn kullanДұm: loglama, cache, auth, rate-limit.

py01.title: Generators / yield
py01.summary: Lazy deДҹer Гјreteci. Her next() Г§aДҹrДұsДұnda yield'a kadar Г§alДұЕҹДұr. BГјyГјk veri iГ§in bellek dostu.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: def gen(): yield value

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Lazy deДҹer Гјreteci. Her next() Г§aДҹrДұsДұnda yield'a kadar Г§alДұЕҹДұr. BГјyГјk veri iГ§in bellek dostu.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
def count_up(n):
    i = 0
    while i < n:
        yield i
        i += 1

g = count_up(3)
next(g)   # 0
next(g)   # 1
next(g)   # 2
next(g)   # StopIteration

for x in count_up(5):  # for ile kullan
    print(x)

# Generator expression (lazy list comp)
gen = (x**2 for x in range(1_000_000))  # anДұnda
next(gen)  # 0, bellek: O(1)

# yield from (alt generator'a delege)
def chain(*iters):
    for it in iters:
        yield from it

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Generator bir kez tГјketilir. Yeniden baЕҹlamak iГ§in yeni obje oluЕҹtur. BГјyГјk dosya okuma, pipeline'lar iГ§in ideal.

py01.title: Type Hints
py01.summary: Python 3.5+ statik tip annotasyonlarДұ. Runtime'da zorlanmaz, IDE ve mypy iГ§in. 3.9+ built-in generic, 3.10+ X|Y union.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
def f(x: int, y: str = '') -> list[int]:
from typing import Optional, Union, Callable

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Python 3.5+ statik tip annotasyonlarДұ. Runtime'da zorlanmaz, IDE ve mypy iГ§in. 3.9+ built-in generic, 3.10+ X|Y union.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# Temel вҖ” fonksiyon
def greet(name: str, loud: bool = False) -> str:
    return name.upper() if loud else name

# Koleksiyonlar (Python 3.9+: kГјГ§Гјk harf)
def process(items: list[int]) -> dict[str, int]: ...
def matrix(data: list[list[float]]) -> None: ...

# Optional = X | None
from typing import Optional
def find(lst: list[str], key: str) -> Optional[int]:
    try: return lst.index(key)
    except ValueError: return None

# Union (3.10+: int | str, eski: Union[int,str])
from typing import Union
def parse(val: Union[int, str, None]) -> str:
    return str(val)
# Python 3.10+:
def parse(val: int | str | None) -> str: ...

# Callable
from typing import Callable
def apply(f: Callable[[int], int], xs: list[int]) -> list[int]:
    return [f(x) for x in xs]

# TypeVar вҖ” generic fonksiyon
from typing import TypeVar
T = TypeVar('T')
def first(lst: list[T]) -> T:
    return lst[0]

# SДұnДұfta вҖ” instance deДҹiЕҹkenler
class Person:
    name: str
    age: int
    hobbies: list[str]
    def __init__(self, name: str, age: int) -> None:
        self.name = name
        self.age  = age
        self.hobbies: list[str] = []

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Type hints runtime'da yoksayДұlДұr вҖ” sadece belgeleme/IDE/mypy. `mypy file.py` ile statik kontrol. 3.9+: list[int], dict[str,int] (bГјyГјk harf import gereksiz). 3.10+: X | Y (Optional/Union yerine). `from __future__ import annotations` ile eski Python'da 3.10+ syntax.

py01.title: Class Temelleri
py01.summary: SДұnДұf tanДұmlama. self her instance metodunun ilk parametresi. Class deДҹiЕҹkeni vs instance deДҹiЕҹkeni. Temel dunder metodlar.

sections.heading: Syntax
AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: SДұnДұf tanДұmlama. self her instance metodunun ilk parametresi. Class deДҹiЕҹkeni vs instance deДҹiЕҹkeni. Temel dunder metodlar.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
class Vector:
    dim = 2               # class deДҹiЕҹkeni (paylaЕҹДұlan)

    def __init__(self, x, y):
        self.x = x        # instance deДҹiЕҹkeni
        self.y = y

    def __repr__(self):   # geliЕҹtirici Г§ДұktДұsДұ вҖ” her zaman tanДұmla
        return f'Vector({self.x}, {self.y})'

    def __str__(self):    # kullanДұcДұ Г§ДұktДұsДұ (print iГ§in)
        return f'({self.x}, {self.y})'

    def __len__(self):    # len(v)
        return self.dim

    def __add__(self, o): # v1 + v2
        return Vector(self.x + o.x, self.y + o.y)

    def __mul__(self, s): # v * scalar
        return Vector(self.x * s, self.y * s)

    def __eq__(self, o):  # v1 == v2
        return self.x == o.x and self.y == o.y

    def magnitude(self):
        return (self.x**2 + self.y**2)**0.5

v1 = Vector(1, 2)
v2 = Vector(3, 4)
v1 + v2            # Vector(4, 6)  вҶҗ __add__
v1 * 3             # Vector(3, 6)  вҶҗ __mul__
print(v1)          # (1, 2)        вҶҗ __str__
repr(v1)           # Vector(1, 2)  вҶҗ __repr__
len(v1)            # 2             вҶҗ __len__
v1 == Vector(1,2)  # True          вҶҗ __eq__
Vector.dim         # 2  (class var)
v1.magnitude()     # 2.236...

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Class deДҹiЕҹkeni tГјm instance'lar arasДұnda paylaЕҹДұlДұr вҖ” mutable (list/dict) ise tehlikeli! instance.attr = val yeni instance attr oluЕҹturur, class var'Дұ maskelemez. __repr__ Г¶ncelik: print(), str() вҶ’ __str__ вҶ’ __repr__ fallback.

py01.title: @staticmethod / @classmethod / @property
py01.summary: staticmethod: self/cls almaz. classmethod: cls alДұr, factory iГ§in. property: getter/setter.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: @staticmethod  |  @classmethod  |  @property

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: staticmethod: self/cls almaz. classmethod: cls alДұr, factory iГ§in. property: getter/setter.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: @property ile attribute gibi eriЕҹim, method parantezi yok. _underscore convention: 'private' ama Python zorlamaz.

py01.title: Inheritance / super()
py01.summary: Alt sДұnДұf parent'Дұn attribute/metodlarДұnДұ miras alДұr. super() ile parent'a eriЕҹ. ABC ile soyut sДұnДұf zorunlu kДұl.

sections.heading: Syntax
AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Alt sДұnДұf parent'Дұn attribute/metodlarДұnДұ miras alДұr. super() ile parent'a eriЕҹ. ABC ile soyut sДұnДұf zorunlu kДұl.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod

class Shape(ABC):          # soyut вҖ” instantiate edilemez
    @abstractmethod
    def area(self) -> float: ...
    @abstractmethod
    def perimeter(self) -> float: ...
    def describe(self):    # concrete method
        return f'Alan={self.area():.2f}'

class Circle(Shape):
    def __init__(self, r):
        self.r = r
    def area(self):      return 3.14159 * self.r**2
    def perimeter(self): return 2 * 3.14159 * self.r

class Rectangle(Shape):
    def __init__(self, w, h):
        super().__init__()   # parent init Г§aДҹДұr
        self.w, self.h = w, h
    def area(self):      return self.w * self.h
    def perimeter(self): return 2*(self.w + self.h)

# Polymorphism
shapes = [Circle(5), Rectangle(3,4)]
for s in shapes:
    print(s.describe())   # area() farklДұ davranДұr

# isinstance / issubclass
isinstance(Circle(5), Shape)     # True
issubclass(Circle, Shape)        # True

# Multiple inheritance вҖ” MRO (C3 linearization)
class A: pass
class B(A): pass
class C(A): pass
class D(B, C): pass
D.__mro__   # (D, B, C, A, object)

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: ABC ile @abstractmethod: subclass implement etmezse TypeError. super().__init__() Г§aДҹДұrmayДұ unutma вҖ” parent state'i init edilmez. Multiple inheritance MRO: D.__mro__ ile sДұrayДұ gГ¶r. `super()` MRO sДұrasДұna gГ¶re bir Гјsttekini Г§aДҹДұrДұr.

py01.title: Class & PyTorch вҖ” KapsamlДұ AГ§Дұklama
py01.summary: Class nedir, __init__ ve self nasДұl Г§alДұЕҹДұr, inheritance vs instance farkДұ, PyTorch nn.Module ve nn.Linear iliЕҹkisi вҖ” hepsi bir arada.

sections.heading: Temel fikir
sections.text:
Class = veri + o veriye ait fonksiyonlarДұn paketi. Normal variable sadece veri tutar, class'tan Гјretilen obje ise veriyi ve o veriyle ne yapabileceДҹini birlikte tutar.

"Bu class bir X'tir" вҶ’ inheritance
"Bu class bir X iГ§erir" вҶ’ instance olarak tut

sections.heading: __init__ ve self
sections.text:
__init__ = obje ГјretildiДҹi anda otomatik Г§alДұЕҹan fonksiyon.
Objenin verisini burada saklarsДұn.

self = "beni Г§aДҹДұran objeye iЕҹaret eden referans".
Her method Г§aДҹrДұsДұna Г¶zel, geГ§ici.
self yazmak convention вҖ” istersen this de yazabilirsin, Г§alДұЕҹДұr.

class Circle:
    def __init__(self, radius):
        self.radius = radius   # objenin Гјzerinde sakla
        # radius      вҶ’ sadece __init__ iГ§inde var, dДұЕҹarДұdan eriЕҹilemiyor
        # self.radius вҶ’ her yerden c.radius ile eriЕҹilir

    def area(self):
        return 3.14 * self.radius ** 2

c1 = Circle(5)
c2 = Circle(10)

c1 ve c2 bellekte farklДұ adreslerde duruyor.
c1.area() Г§aДҹrДұldДұДҹДұnda Python Circle.area(c1) yapДұyor вҖ” self = c1'in adresi.
c2.area() Г§aДҹrДұldДұДҹДұnda self = c2'nin adresi.
Birbirini override etmiyor Г§ГјnkГј her obje bellekte ayrДұ yerde,
self her seferinde o ana Г¶zel set ediliyor.

sections.heading: Class vs Instance
sections.text:
c1 = Circle(5)   # instance вҖ” bellekte 0x001
c2 = Circle(10)  # instance вҖ” bellekte 0x002

Class    = Еҹablon, bellekte tek bir yerde duruyor, veri tutmuyor.
Instance = Еҹablondan Гјretilen obje, kendi verisini kendi Гјzerinde tutuyor.

sections.heading: Inheritance vs Instance olarak tutmak
sections.text:
class Dog(Animal):        # "Dog bir Animal'dДұr" вҶ’ inheritance
    def __init__(self):
        self.leg = Leg()  # "Dog bir Leg iГ§erir" вҶ’ instance olarak tut

Kural:
  "Bu class bir X'tir"    вҶ’ inheritance
  "Bu class bir X iГ§erir" вҶ’ instance olarak tut

sections.heading: PyTorch вҖ” nn ne
sections.text:
import torch.nn as nn

torch      вҶ’ paket
torch.nn   вҶ’ torch'un iГ§indeki alt paket, nn kДұsaltmasДұ verdik
nn.Module  вҶ’ nn paketinin iГ§indeki bir class
nn.Linear  вҶ’ nn paketinin iГ§indeki baЕҹka bir class

Nokta notasyonu aynДұ gГ¶rГјnГјyor ama farklДұ anlam:
  nn.Module     # paketten class'a eriЕҹ
  c1.area()     # objeden metoda eriЕҹ

sections.heading: PyTorch model class'Дұ
sections.text:
class MyModel(nn.Module):       # inherit вҖ” nn.Module'Гјn altyapДұsДұnДұ al
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()      # nn.Module'Гјn kendi __init__'ini Г§alДұЕҹtДұr (zorunlu)
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(784, 128)   # nn.Linear'dan instance Гјret, iГ§inde tut
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(128, 10)

    def forward(self, x):
        x = self.fc1(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        return x

nn.Module inheritance ile alДұnДұyor вҖ” MyModel bir nn.Module'dГјr.
  Parametre takibi, GPU'ya taЕҹДұma, kaydetme/yГјkleme altyapДұsДұ buradan geliyor.

nn.Linear instance olarak tutuluyor вҖ” MyModel bir Linear deДҹil, Linear iГ§eriyor.
  self.fc1 Еҹeklinde kaydedildiДҹi iГ§in PyTorch gГ¶rГјyor ve parametrelerini kaydediyor.
  self. olmadan yazsan kaydetmez.

super().__init__() вҖ” parent class'Дұn __init__'ini Г§alДұЕҹtДұr.
  Yazmazsan nn.Module'Гјn altyapДұsДұ devreye girmiyor, parametreler kayДұt edilmiyor.

nn.Linear da aslДұnda nn.Module'den inherit ediyor:
  class Linear(nn.Module):          # PyTorch'un kendi kodunda
      def __init__(self, in_features, out_features):
          super().__init__()
          self.weight = ...
          self.bias = ...

Yani nn.Linear de bir nn.Module, senin MyModel'Дұn da bir nn.Module вҖ”
ikisi aynДұ class'tan tГјremiЕҹ. PyTorch her nn.Module instance'ДұnДұ tanДұdДұДҹДұ iГ§in
self.fc1'i gГ¶rГјnce "bu da bir modГјl, parametrelerini kaydet" diyor.

sections.heading: AkДұЕҹ Г¶zeti
sections.text:
model = MyModel()     # __init__ Г§alДұЕҹДұr, fc1 ve fc2 oluЕҹur ve kaydedilir
out = model(x)        # forward(x) Г§alДұЕҹДұr
model.cuda()          # fc1 ve fc2'nin aДҹДұrlДұklarДұ GPU'ya taЕҹДұnДұr вҖ” self. ile
                      # kaydettiДҹin iГ§in PyTorch nerede bakacaДҹДұnДұ biliyor
model.parameters()    # tГјm aДҹДұrlДұklarДұ dГ¶ner вҖ” optimizer bunu kullanДұr

py01.title: Dunder / Magic Methods

__str__ __repr__ __len__ __getitem__
__iter__ __contains__ __eq__ __lt__

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: __repr__ her zaman tanДұmla вҖ” debug iГ§in kritik. __eq__ tanДұmlarsan __hash__ da tanДұmla (aksi halde set/dict'te kullanДұlamaz). functools.total_ordering: sadece __eq__ + __lt__ tanДұmla, geri kalanДұ (@total_ordering decorator ile) otomatik gelir.

py01.title: @dataclass
py01.summary: Python 3.7+. __init__, __repr__, __eq__ otomatik Гјretir. Tip annotation zorunlu. Mutable default iГ§in field() Еҹart.

AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Python 3.7+. __init__, __repr__, __eq__ otomatik Гјretir. Tip annotation zorunlu. Mutable default iГ§in field() Еҹart.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: Mutable default (list, dict, set) iГ§in field(default_factory=...) вҖ” normal = [] tuzak! frozen=True: set/dict key olabilir. slots=True (3.10+): bellek tasarrufu. @dataclass ile normal class'Дұ Г§oДҹu zaman deДҹiЕҹtirebilirsin.

py01.title: collections.deque
py01.summary: Double-ended queue. Her iki uГ§tan O(1) append/pop. BFS iГ§in ideal.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
from collections import deque
deque(iterable, maxlen=None)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Double-ended queue. Her iki uГ§tan O(1) append/pop. BFS iГ§in ideal.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
from collections import deque
dq = deque([1, 2, 3])
dq.appendleft(0)   # deque([0,1,2,3])
dq.append(4)       # deque([0,1,2,3,4])
dq.popleft()       # 0  (O(1)!)
dq.pop()           # 4
dq.rotate(1)       # saДҹa dГ¶ndГјr
deque(maxlen=3)    # sabit boyut: eski eleman silinir

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: list.pop(0) O(n), deque.popleft() O(1). BFS queue iГ§in kullan. maxlen sliding window iГ§in.

py01.title: heapq (Min-Heap)
py01.summary: Regular list Гјzerinde min-heap. Python'da sadece min-heap var, max iГ§in negatifle.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
import heapq
heapq.heappush(h, x)  |  heapq.heappop(h)
heap[0]  вҶ’ peek

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Regular list Гјzerinde min-heap. Python'da sadece min-heap var, max iГ§in negatifle.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
import heapq
h = []
heapq.heappush(h, 3)
heapq.heappush(h, 1)
heapq.heappush(h, 2)
heapq.heappop(h)      # 1 (minimum)
h[0]                  # peek (O(1))
heapq.heapify(lst)    # in-place O(n)
# Max-heap: -x ekle, -heappop() al

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Min-heap. Max iГ§in: heappush(h, -x), -heappop(h). nsmallest/nlargest convenience func'larДұ var.

py01.title: bisect (Binary Search)
py01.summary: SДұralДұ listede binary search. Insertion point dГ¶ner, O(log n).

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
bisect.bisect_left(a, x)
bisect.insort(a, x)

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: SДұralДұ listede binary search. Insertion point dГ¶ner, O(log n).

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
import bisect
a = [1, 2, 4, 4, 7]
bisect.bisect_left(a, 4)   # 2 (ilk 4'Гјn yeri)
bisect.bisect_right(a, 4)  # 4 (son 4'ten sonra)
bisect.insort(a, 5)        # sДұralДұ insert
# Arama:
idx = bisect.bisect_left(a, x)
found = idx < len(a) and a[idx] == x

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: bisect_left: ilk konum. bisect_right: son konum. insort O(n) (list insert). Sadece lookup O(log n).

py01.title: try / except / finally
py01.summary: Hata yakalama. else: hata yoksa Г§alДұЕҹДұr. finally: her zaman Г§alДұЕҹДұr.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text: try: ... except ExcType as e: ... else: ... finally: ...

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Hata yakalama. else: hata yoksa Г§alДұЕҹДұr. finally: her zaman Г§alДұЕҹДұr.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
Notlar
sections.text: Bare except: kullanma, Exception yakala. raise ile yeniden fДұrlat. except Exception as e: en geniЕҹ.

py01.title: raise / assert / Custom Exception
py01.summary: raise: hata fДұrlat. assert: varsayДұmДұ doДҹrula (debug iГ§in). Custom exception: kendi hata tipini oluЕҹtur.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
raise ExcType(msg)
assert cond, msg
class MyErr(Exception): ...

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: raise: hata fДұrlat. assert: varsayДұmДұ doДҹrula (debug iГ§in). Custom exception: kendi hata tipini oluЕҹtur.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# raise
raise ValueError('negatif olamaz')
raise TypeError('int beklendi')

# assert (debugging / test iГ§in)
assert len(x) > 0, 'Liste boЕҹ olamaz'
assert result.shape == (3, 3), f'Shape: {result.shape}'

# Custom exception
class ValidationError(Exception):
    def __init__(self, field, msg):
        self.field = field
        super().__init__(f'{field}: {msg}')

try:
    raise ValidationError('age', 'negatif olamaz')
except ValidationError as e:
    print(e.field, e)  # age: age: negatif olamaz

# HiyerarЕҹi (parent catch child'Дұ da yakalar)
class AppError(Exception): pass
class DBError(AppError): pass
try: ...
except AppError: ...   # DBError'Дұ da yakalar

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: assert -O (optimize) flag ile devre dДұЕҹДұ kalДұr, production gГјvenliДҹi iГ§in kullanma. Built-in exceptions: ValueError, TypeError, KeyError, IndexError, FileNotFoundError, RuntimeError.

py01.title: with statement (Context Manager)
py01.summary: KaynaklarДұ gГјvenle aГ§Дұp kapat. __enter__/__exit__ Г§aДҹДұrДұr. Exception'da bile kapanДұr.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
with open('f') as f:
    ...

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: KaynaklarДұ gГјvenle aГ§Дұp kapat. __enter__/__exit__ Г§aДҹДұrДұr. Exception'da bile kapanДұr.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
with open('file.txt', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()       # tГјm dosya
    lines = f.readlines()    # list of lines

with open('out.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('hello\n')

with open('a.txt') as a, open('b.txt') as b:
    ...  # Г§oklu context manager

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: Mode: 'r'=read, 'w'=write(Гјzer), 'a'=append, 'rb'=binary. encoding='utf-8' ekle.

py01.title: File I/O
py01.summary: Dosya okuma/yazma. with bloДҹu exception'da bile kapatДұr. Mode: r/w/a/x/rb/wb. pathlib modern yol yГ¶netimi.

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.text:
with open(path, mode, encoding='utf-8') as f:
from pathlib import Path

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Dosya okuma/yazma. with bloДҹu exception'da bile kapatДұr. Mode: r/w/a/x/rb/wb. pathlib modern yol yГ¶netimi.

sections.heading: Г–rnek
sections.text:
# Okuma
with open('data.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()          # tГјm dosya вҶ’ str
    # ya da:
    lines   = f.readlines()    # liste (\n dahil)
    line    = f.readline()     # tek satДұr

# SatДұr satДұr iter вҖ” bГјyГјk dosya iГ§in ideal (lazy)
with open('big.txt', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    for line in f:              # her seferinde 1 satДұr yГјkler
        process(line.rstrip('\n'))

# Yazma
with open('out.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('Merhaba\n')
    f.writelines(['a\n', 'b\n', 'c\n'])

# Append
with open('log.txt', 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('yeni log satДұrДұ\n')

# JSON okuma / yazma
import json
with open('data.json', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = json.load(f)         # parse
with open('out.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

# pathlib вҖ” modern, platform-baДҹДұmsДұz
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('data')
p = base / 'subdir' / 'file.txt'   # / operatГ¶rГј ile birleЕҹtir
p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')       # tek satДұrda oku
p.write_text('iГ§erik', encoding='utf-8')
p.exists()                          # True/False
p.is_file(); p.is_dir()
p.suffix        # '.txt'
p.stem          # 'file'
p.parent        # Path('data/subdir')
list(base.glob('**/*.csv'))         # recursive glob
for f in base.iterdir():            # klasГ¶r iГ§i

sections.heading: Notlar
sections.text: encoding='utf-8' her zaman belirt вҖ” platform default'u farklДұ olabilir (Windows: cp1252). 'x' mode: dosya varsa hata (Г¶rtmez). Binary: 'rb'/'wb'. CSV iГ§in newline='' parametresi. pathlib, os.path'ten Г§ok daha temiz вҖ” yeni kod iГ§in tercih et.

py02.title: Arrays & Hashing
py02.summary: Array, bellekte ardДұЕҹДұk yerleЕҹtirilmiЕҹ elemanlarДұn O(1) index eriЕҹimine izin verdiДҹi temel yapДұdДұr. Hash Map, key'i hash fonksiyonu ile bucket'a eЕҹler; average O(1) insert/lookup saДҹlar ama collision

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Array, bellekte ardДұЕҹДұk yerleЕҹtirilmiЕҹ elemanlarДұn O(1) index eriЕҹimine izin verdiДҹi temel yapДұdДұr. Hash Map, key'i hash fonksiyonu ile bucket'a eЕҹler; average O(1) insert/lookup saДҹlar ama collision durumunda worst-case O(n) olabilir. Hash Set, duplicate tespiti ve membership check iГ§in idealdir. ГҮoДҹu leetcode problemi bu ikisini kombine ederek Г§Г¶zГјlГјr. Prefix sum ise range query'leri O(1)'e indirir.

sections.heading: Temel Kavramlar
sections.text:
Array nedir? Bellekte yan yana duran kutular. Her kutunun numarasДұ (index) var. nums[3] dersen direkt o kutuya gidiyorsun вҖ” O(1). Ama ortaya bir Еҹey eklemek istersen saДҹДұndaki her Еҹeyi bir kaydДұrman gerekir вҖ” O(n).

Hash Map nedir? 'Anahtar вҶ’ deДҹer' tablosu. AltДұnda Еҹu Г§alДұЕҹДұyor: key'i bir fonksiyondan geГ§irip bir sayДұya Г§eviriyorsun (hash), o sayДұ sana tablodaki slotu gГ¶steriyor. Г–rneДҹin 'elma' вҶ’ 42 numaralДұ slot вҶ’ deДҹer. Bu yГјzden ortalamada O(1) eriЕҹim. ГҮakДұЕҹma (iki farklДұ key aynДұ slota denk gelirse) nadiren olur ama worst case O(n) yapabilir.

Hash Set: Hash map'in sadece 'bu var mДұ?' sorusunu cevaplayan versiyonu. DeДҹer saklamaz, sadece key.

FaydasДұ: 'Bu deДҹeri daha Г¶nce gГ¶rdГјm mГј?', 'KaГ§ kez geГ§ti?', 'Bu kelime var mДұ?' sorularДұnДұ O(1)'de cevaplarsДұn. Neredeyse her problemin temelinde bunlar var.

sections.heading: Patterns
items: Two Sum: seen dict вҶ’ complement = target-x, seen'de var mДұ?
Frequency count: Counter(arr) veya defaultdict(int)
Anagram: sorted(s)==sorted(t) ya da Counter(s)==Counter(t)
Duplicate detect: set'e ekle, zaten varsa duplicate
Group by hash: defaultdict(list), key=sorted(word) veya tuple(Counter)
Prefix sum: pre[i]=pre[i-1]+arr[i], range sum = pre[r]-pre[l-1]
Product except self: left pass + right pass, O(1) extra space
Encoding/hashing strings: (char-'a') ile 26-bit mask veya frozenset

sections.heading: Complexity
sections.text: Array eriЕҹim O(1) В· Hash lookup/insert O(1) avg, O(n) worst В· Prefix sum build O(n), query O(1)

sections.heading: Python Kodu
Г–rnek Problemler
items: Two Sum
Contains Duplicate
Valid Anagram
Group Anagrams
Top K Frequent Elements
Product of Array Except Self
Valid Sudoku
Encode and Decode Strings
Longest Consecutive Sequence

py02.title: Two Pointers
py02.summary: Д°ki pointer aynДұ dizide farklДұ hДұzlarda veya zДұt yГ¶nlerde ilerler. Sorted array'de O(nВІ)'yi O(n)'e indirir. KarЕҹДұ yГ¶nlГј pointer (l=0, r=n-1): hedef sum var mДұ, palindrome mi. AynДұ yГ¶nlГј (fast/slow): l

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Д°ki pointer aynДұ dizide farklДұ hДұzlarda veya zДұt yГ¶nlerde ilerler. Sorted array'de O(nВІ)'yi O(n)'e indirir. KarЕҹДұ yГ¶nlГј pointer (l=0, r=n-1): hedef sum var mДұ, palindrome mi. AynДұ yГ¶nlГј (fast/slow): linked list cycle, middle bulma. 3Sum/4Sum: dДұЕҹtaki loop fix, iГ§te iki pointer. Trapping Rain Water: her pozisyon iГ§in max_left ve max_right'Дұ Г¶nceden hesapla veya iki pointer ile O(1) space.

sections.heading: Temel Kavramlar
sections.text:
Two Pointers nedir? AynДұ dizide iki farklДұ index. l (left) ve r (right). Genellikle zДұt uГ§lardan baЕҹlayДұp ortaya doДҹru ilerlerler.

Neden iЕҹe yarar? 'TГјm Г§iftleri dene' desen O(nВІ). Ama dizi sДұralДұysa akДұllДұca oynayabilirsin: l+r toplamДұ hedeften kГјГ§Гјkse l'yi bir saДҹa kaydДұr (toplamДұ bГјyГјt), bГјyГјkse r'yi bir sola kaydДұr (toplamДұ kГјГ§Гјlt). Her adДұmda imkГўnsДұz bir olasДұlДұДҹДұ eliyorsun вҖ” toplamda O(n) adДұm.

AynДұ yГ¶nlГј versiyon: fast/slow pointer. Fast 2 adДұm, slow 1 adДұm. DГ¶ngГјlГј linked list'te mutlaka buluЕҹurlar (Floyd algoritmasДұ). OrtayДұ bulmak iГ§in de kullanДұlДұr: fast sona ulaЕҹДұnca slow tam ortada.

FaydasДұ: Sorted array, palindrome kontrolГј, cycle tespiti, N sayДұdan hedef toplamДұ bulmak вҖ” O(nВІ) вҶ’ O(n) dГ¶nГјЕҹГјmГј.

sections.heading: Patterns
items: Opposite direction: sorted array'de l+r sum check, palindrome
3Sum: sort + fix i, l=i+1 r=n-1, skip duplicates
Container with most water: min(height[l],height[r])*(r-l), kГјГ§Гјk olanДұ kaydДұr
Trapping Rain Water: min(max_left, max_right) - height[i]
Fast/slow (same dir): Floyd cycle, find middle, remove nth from end
Partition: Dutch National Flag, 0/1/2 sort O(n) O(1)

sections.heading: Complexity
sections.text: O(n) time В· O(1) space (sorting dahil deДҹil)

sections.heading: Python Kodu
sections.text:
# Two Sum II (sorted array)
def twoSum(numbers, target):
    l, r = 0, len(numbers) - 1
    while l < r:
        s = numbers[l] + numbers[r]
        if s == target: return [l+1, r+1]  # 1-indexed
        elif s < target: l += 1
        else: r -= 1

# 3Sum вҖ” skip duplicates
def threeSum(nums):
    nums.sort()
    res = []
    for i, a in enumerate(nums):
        if i > 0 and a == nums[i-1]: continue  # skip dup
        l, r = i+1, len(nums)-1
        while l < r:
            s = a + nums[l] + nums[r]
            if s == 0:
                res.append([a, nums[l], nums[r]])
                while l < r and nums[l] == nums[l+1]: l += 1
                while l < r and nums[r] == nums[r-1]: r -= 1
                l += 1; r -= 1
            elif s < 0: l += 1
            else: r -= 1
    return res

# Trapping Rain Water вҖ” two pointer O(1) space
def trap(height):
    l, r = 0, len(height)-1
    max_l = max_r = water = 0
    while l < r:
        if height[l] < height[r]:
            if height[l] >= max_l: max_l = height[l]
            else: water += max_l - height[l]
            l += 1
        else:
            if height[r] >= max_r: max_r = height[r]
            else: water += max_r - height[r]
            r -= 1
    return water

# Valid Palindrome
def isPalindrome(s):
    s = [c.lower() for c in s if c.isalnum()]
    l, r = 0, len(s)-1
    while l < r:
        if s[l] != s[r]: return False
        l += 1; r -= 1
    return True

py02.title: Stack
py02.summary: LIFO yapДұsДұ. Python'da list (append/pop), C++'da std::stack. Monotonic stack, Next Greater/Smaller Element sorunlarДұnДұ O(n)'e indirir вҖ” her eleman en fazla bir kez push ve pop edilir. Min Stack: her n

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: LIFO yapДұsДұ. Python'da list (append/pop), C++'da std::stack. Monotonic stack, Next Greater/Smaller Element sorunlarДұnДұ O(n)'e indirir вҖ” her eleman en fazla bir kez push ve pop edilir. Min Stack: her node'a o andaki global min'i de sakla. Calculator: operatГ¶r Г¶nceliДҹi iГ§in iki stack (vals, ops) veya postfix (RPN). Histogram problemi (Largest Rectangle) ise monotonic increasing stack ile Г§Г¶zГјlГјr.

sections.heading: Temel Kavramlar
sections.text:
Stack nedir? LIFO вҖ” Last In First Out. Son giren ilk Г§Дұkar. GerГ§ek hayat: tabak yДұДҹДұnДұ. Гңstteki tabaДҹДұ alДұrsДұn, altДұndakine ulaЕҹmak iГ§in Г¶nce Гјstekileri kaldДұrman lazДұm.

3 operasyon, hepsi O(1):
- push: Гјste koy
- pop: Гјstten al ve kaldДұr
- peek/top: Гјste bak ama kaldДұrma

Python'da list kullanДұlДұr (append/pop). C++'da std::stack.

Neden Г¶nemli? 'En son aГ§tДұДҹДұmДұ kapat' mantДұДҹДұndaki her Еҹey stack ile Г§Г¶zГјlГјr: parantez eЕҹleЕҹtirme, tarayДұcДұda geri butonu, undo/redo, fonksiyon Г§aДҹrДұ yДұДҹДұnДұ (recursive bir fonksiyon Г§aДҹДұrdДұДҹДұnda iЕҹletim sistemi stack'e yazar).

Monotonic stack: Stack'i sadece azalan (ya da sadece artan) tutarak 'saДҹДұndaki ilk bГјyГјk eleman' gibi sorularДұ O(n)'de Г§Г¶zersin.

py02.title: Binary Search
py02.summary: SДұralДұ search space'i her adДұmda ikiye bГ¶lerek O(log n) ile Г§alДұЕҹДұr. Klasik array search dДұЕҹДұnda 'binary search on answer' tekniДҹi ile monotonic bir fonksiyonun (feasible? вҶ’ true/false) eЕҹiДҹini bulur.

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: SДұralДұ search space'i her adДұmda ikiye bГ¶lerek O(log n) ile Г§alДұЕҹДұr. Klasik array search dДұЕҹДұnda 'binary search on answer' tekniДҹi ile monotonic bir fonksiyonun (feasible? вҶ’ true/false) eЕҹiДҹini bulur. Rotated sorted array: hangi yarДұ sДұralДұ, hedef o yarДұda mДұ? Boundary arama: bisect_left = ilk geГ§erli, bisect_right = son geГ§erli + 1. Template seГ§imi (lo<=hi vs lo<hi) kritik вҖ” off-by-one hatalarДұ Г§ok sДұk gГ¶rГјlГјr.

sections.heading: Temel Kavramlar
sections.text:
Binary Search nedir? SДұralДұ bir dizide hedefi aramak iГ§in her adДұmda arama alanДұnДұ yarДұya bГ¶l.

NasДұl Г§alДұЕҹДұr: Ortaya bak. Hedef ortadaki sayДұdan kГјГ§Гјkse sol yarДұya geГ§, bГјyГјkse saДҹ yarДұya. EЕҹitse buldun. Her adДұmda kalan eleman sayДұsДұ yarДұya dГјЕҹer.

Neden hДұzlДұ? 1 milyar elemanlДұ dizide en fazla 30 adДұm (logвӮӮ(10вҒ№) вүҲ 30). Linear search: 1 milyar adДұm. Bu fark hayat kurtarДұr.

GeniЕҹletilmiЕҹ kullanДұm вҖ” Binary search on answer: 'Minimum hДұz nedir ki X gГјnde bitirebilir?' gibi sorularda. ЕһГ¶yle dГјЕҹГјn: hДұz arttДұkГ§a gГјn azalДұr (monoton iliЕҹki). O zaman 'bu hДұz yeterli mi?' koЕҹulunu binary search ile ara вҖ” cevap O(log(max_speed)) adДұmda.

FaydasДұ: SДұralДұ veri, 'kaГ§ДұncДұ pozisyon', monoton koЕҹul, rotated array aramak.

sections.heading: Patterns
items: Classic: lo=0 hi=n-1, mid=(lo+hi)//2, lo<=hi
Left boundary (first true): lo=0 hi=n, result=lo at end
Right boundary (last true): hi shrinks, result=hi at end
Binary search on answer: lo=min_possible, hi=max_possible, check(mid)?
Rotated sorted array: if nums[lo]<=nums[mid] вҶ’ left sorted
2D matrix search: row = mid//cols, col = mid%cols
Python bisect: bisect_left(arr,x), bisect_right(arr,x)

sections.heading: Complexity
sections.text: O(log n) time В· O(1) space В· Search on answer: O(log(range) Г— check_cost)

sections.heading: Python Kodu
sections.text:
# Classic Binary Search
def search(nums, target):
    lo, hi = 0, len(nums) - 1
    while lo <= hi:
        mid = lo + (hi - lo) // 2  # overflow-safe
        if nums[mid] == target: return mid
        elif nums[mid] < target: lo = mid + 1
        else: hi = mid - 1
    return -1

# Search in Rotated Sorted Array
def searchRotated(nums, target):
    lo, hi = 0, len(nums)-1
    while lo <= hi:
        mid = (lo+hi)//2
        if nums[mid] == target: return mid
        # left half sorted?
        if nums[lo] <= nums[mid]:
            if nums[lo] <= target < nums[mid]: hi = mid-1
            else: lo = mid+1
        else:  # right half sorted
            if nums[mid] < target <= nums[hi]: lo = mid+1
            else: hi = mid-1
    return -1

# Binary Search on Answer вҖ” Koko Eating Bananas
def minEatingSpeed(piles, h):
    def canFinish(speed):
        return sum((p + speed - 1) // speed for p in piles) <= h
    lo, hi = 1, max(piles)
    while lo < hi:
        mid = (lo + hi) // 2
        if canFinish(mid): hi = mid   # try smaller
        else: lo = mid + 1
    return lo

# Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
def findMin(nums):
    lo, hi = 0, len(nums)-1
    while lo < hi:
        mid = (lo+hi)//2
        if nums[mid] > nums[hi]: lo = mid+1  # min in right
        else: hi = mid                        # min in left or mid
    return nums[lo]

# 2D Matrix search вҖ” treat as 1D
def searchMatrix(matrix, target):
    m, n = len(matrix), len(matrix[0])
    lo, hi = 0, m*n - 1
    while lo <= hi:
        mid = (lo+hi)//2
        val = matrix[mid//n][mid%n]
        if val == target: return True
        elif val < target: lo = mid+1
        else: hi = mid-1
    return False

# bisect usage
import bisect
arr = [1,3,5,7,9]
bisect.bisect_left(arr, 5)   # вҶ’ 2 (first index >= 5)
bisect.bisect_right(arr, 5)  # вҶ’ 3 (first index > 5)

py02.title: Sliding Window
py02.summary: Contiguous subarray/substring Гјzerinde O(n) Г§Г¶zГјm saДҹlar. Fixed window: sum/average of k elements, saДҹdan ekle soldan Г§Дұkar. Variable window: koЕҹul bozulunca sol pointer'Дұ kaydДұr. Character map ile 'P

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Contiguous subarray/substring Гјzerinde O(n) Г§Г¶zГјm saДҹlar. Fixed window: sum/average of k elements, saДҹdan ekle soldan Г§Дұkar. Variable window: koЕҹul bozulunca sol pointer'Дұ kaydДұr. Character map ile 'Permutation in String' ve 'Minimum Window Substring' Г§Г¶zГјlГјr. Deque ile 'Sliding Window Maximum' O(n)'de Г§Г¶zГјlГјr вҖ” deque her zaman mevcut window'un max kandidatlarДұnДұ azalan sДұrada tutar.

sections.heading: Temel Kavramlar
sections.text:
Sliding Window nedir? Dizi Гјzerinde kayan bir pencere. l ve r pointer'larДұ pencerenin sol ve saДҹ sДұnДұrДұnДұ belirler.

Neden gerekli? 'En uzun tekrarsДұz substring' iГ§in brute force: tГјm substring'leri dene вҶ’ O(nВІ). Sliding window: her karakter en fazla 2 kez iЕҹlenir (bir eklenirken, bir Г§ДұkarДұlДұrken) вҶ’ O(n).

Fixed pencere (boyut k): r ilerledikГ§e saДҹdan ekle, soldan Г§Дұkar. Г–r: her k boyutlu alt dizinin ortalamasДұ.

Variable pencere: KoЕҹul bozulana kadar r'yi ilerlet (geniЕҹlet). Bozulunca l'yi ilerlet (daralt). Г–r: en uzun tekrarsДұz substring вҖ” aynДұ karakter gГ¶rГјnГјnce l'yi kaydДұr.

FaydasДұ: Contiguous subarray/substring sorularДұnda O(nВІ) вҶ’ O(n). 'En uzun/kДұsa ... iГ§eren pencere' вҶ’ sliding window dГјЕҹГјn.

sections.heading: Patterns
items: Fixed window size k: win += arr[r] - arr[r-k]
Variable window max length: expand r, shrink l when invalid
Variable window min length: shrink while valid
Char frequency: need dict + missing/formed counter
At most k distinct: shrink when len(freq)>k
Longest without repeat: seen dict вҶ’ l = max(l, seen[c]+1)
Sliding window max: monotonic deque (popleft stale, pop smaller from right)

sections.heading: Complexity
sections.text: O(n) time В· O(k) space (k = unique chars or window size)

sections.heading: Python Kodu
sections.text:
# Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
def lengthOfLongestSubstring(s):
    seen = {}  # char -> last index
    l = best = 0
    for r, c in enumerate(s):
        if c in seen and seen[c] >= l:
            l = seen[c] + 1
        seen[c] = r
        best = max(best, r - l + 1)
    return best

# Longest Repeating Character Replacement
def characterReplacement(s, k):
    count = {}
    l = max_count = best = 0
    for r, c in enumerate(s):
        count[c] = count.get(c, 0) + 1
        max_count = max(max_count, count[c])
        # window size - max_freq > k вҶ’ shrink
        if (r - l + 1) - max_count > k:
            count[s[l]] -= 1
            l += 1
        best = max(best, r - l + 1)
    return best

# Permutation in String
def checkInclusion(s1, s2):
    from collections import Counter
    need = Counter(s1)
    window = {}
    have = required = len(need)
    l = 0
    for r, c in enumerate(s2):
        window[c] = window.get(c, 0) + 1
        if c in need and window[c] == need[c]:
            have -= 1
        while (r - l + 1) > len(s1):
            lc = s2[l]
            if lc in need and window[lc] == need[lc]:
                have += 1
            window[lc] -= 1
            l += 1
        if have == 0: return True
    return False

# Sliding Window Maximum вҖ” monotonic deque
from collections import deque
def maxSlidingWindow(nums, k):
    dq = deque()  # indices, decreasing values
    res = []
    for i, x in enumerate(nums):
        while dq and nums[dq[-1]] < x: dq.pop()  # remove smaller
        dq.append(i)
        if dq[0] <= i - k: dq.popleft()  # out of window
        if i >= k - 1: res.append(nums[dq[0]])
    return res

# Minimum Window Substring
from collections import Counter
def minWindow(s, t):
    need = Counter(t)
    missing = len(t)
    best_l = best_r = l = 0
    for r, c in enumerate(s, 1):
        if need[c] > 0: missing -= 1
        need[c] -= 1
        if missing == 0:
            while need[s[l]] < 0: need[s[l]] += 1; l += 1
            if not best_r or r - l < best_r - best_l:
                best_l, best_r = l, r
            need[s[l]] += 1; missing += 1; l += 1
    return s[best_l:best_r]

py02.title: Linked List
py02.summary: Node zinciri: her node val + next pointer iГ§erir. BaЕҹa insert/delete O(1) ama index eriЕҹimi O(n). Dummy head (sentinel) ekleyerek edge case'ler (boЕҹ liste, tek node) azalДұr. Fast/slow pointer (Floyd):

sections.heading: AГ§Дұklama
sections.text: Node zinciri: her node val + next pointer iГ§erir. BaЕҹa insert/delete O(1) ama index eriЕҹimi O(n). Dummy head (sentinel) ekleyerek edge case'ler (boЕҹ liste, tek node) azalДұr. Fast/slow pointer (Floyd): cycle tespiti, middle bulma, nth from end. Reverse: prev/curr pointer swap. Merge Sort on linked list: O(n log n) time, O(log n) stack space. LRU Cache: HashMap + doubly linked list ile O(1) get/put.

sections.heading: Temel Kavramlar
sections.text:
Linked List nedir? Her node kendi deДҹerini + bir sonraki node'un adresini tutar. Bellek ardДұЕҹДұk olmak zorunda deДҹil вҖ” node'lar her yere saГ§ДұlmДұЕҹ olabilir, pointer'lar birbirine baДҹlar.

Array ile fark:
- Array: index eriЕҹimi O(1), ortaya insert/delete O(n) (kaydДұrma)
- LinkedList: index eriЕҹimi O(n) (baЕҹtan git), baЕҹa insert/delete O(1) (sadece pointer deДҹiЕҹtir)

Singly linked: sadece next pointer. Doubly linked: hem next hem prev. Her iki yГ¶ne O(1) hareket.

Reverse nasДұl yapДұlДұr: 3 pointer (prev, curr, next). curr.next'i prev'e yГ¶nlendir, hepsini bir ilerlet. 3 satДұr kod.

FaydasДұ: SДұk baЕҹa/sona ekleme, LRU Cache (O(1) eleman Г¶ne al), queue implementasyonu, pointer manipГјlasyon sorularДұ.

sections.heading: Patterns
items: Reverse: prev=None, curr=head, nxt=curr.next, curr.next=prev, prev=curr, curr=nxt
Dummy head: result = dummy = ListNode(0), result.next = dummy.next
Fast/slow pointer: cycle вҶ’ Floyd, middle вҶ’ slow stops at mid
Merge two sorted: compare heads, advance smaller
Nth from end: fast advance n, then slow+fast together
Palindrome list: find mid, reverse second half, compare
LRU Cache: dict{keyвҶ’node} + doubly linked list (O(1) move to head)
